title: Morning Blood Pressure + Medication Routine
details: Check blood pressure before the morning dose, take the prescribed medication, and log both readings for clinician review.
prep_required: ["Medication organizer refilled","Blood pressure cuff placed near medication"]
skip_adjustment: If missed, record the reason and resume the next scheduled dose without doubling medication.

title: Primary Care Review - Check-In
details: Review symptoms, medication adherence, and recent health trends with the physician.
skip_adjustment: Rebook the next available provider slot and send the latest metrics summary ahead of time.

title: Lab Testing Appointment - Check-In
details: Complete planned bloodwork or diagnostic testing and confirm follow-up routing.
skip_adjustment: Book the next morning lab slot and preserve fasting instructions.

title: Dietitian Consultation - Hypertension Meal Plan
details: Review sodium intake, meal timing, grocery habits, and adherence to a cardiometabolic-friendly meal plan.
prep_required: ["3-day food log completed","Recent blood pressure summary available"]
skip_adjustment: Rebook within the same fortnight and send the meal log ahead of the replacement session.

title: Sleep Coaching Call - Plan Tuning
details: Review bedtime consistency, evening routine, and overnight recovery patterns.
skip_adjustment: Rebook the next available provider slot and send the latest metrics summary ahead of time.

title: Guided Breathing - Sleep Support
details: Use slow exhale-biased breathing to lower evening stress load and improve sleep onset.
skip_adjustment: Reschedule within the same week if symptoms are stable; otherwise mark for manual review.

title: Fluid Checkpoint - Energy Stabilizer
details: Pause for a structured hydration target and record intake progress.
skip_adjustment: Replace with the closest balanced meal option and record deviation in the nutrition log.

title: Balanced Breakfast - Protein Rebuild
details: Build breakfast around protein, fiber, and steady energy release.
prep_required: ["Ingredients prepped the night before","Breakfast logged in nutrition app"]
skip_adjustment: Replace with the closest balanced meal option and record deviation in the nutrition log.

title: Sleep-Support Dinner - Energy Stabilizer
details: Build dinner around vegetables, legumes, and a moderate portion of lean protein.
skip_adjustment: Replace with the closest balanced meal option and record deviation in the nutrition log.

title: Outdoor Walk - Aerobic Base
details: Walk at a pace that slightly elevates breathing while keeping posture tall.
skip_adjustment: Move to the next free slot within 48 hours and lower intensity by one step.
